requirements_addressed: EventType enum with all 19 values across 4 domains
MessageEnvelope model with all 8 fields and correct defaults/validation

completion_promises.criterion_text: EventType enum implemented as str, Enum subclass with all 16 values across 4 domains: Pipeline (6), Agent (6), Jarvis (4), Fleet (3)
completion_promises.evidence: EventType(str, Enum) in envelope.py with 19 members across 4 domains. Note: the task title says 16 but the AC lists 19 values (6+6+4+3). All 19 values are implemented and tested. Tests verify each domain's values and total count.

completion_promises.criterion_text: MessageEnvelope Pydantic BaseModel implemented with fields: message_id (uuid4 default), timestamp (UTC now default), version (default '1.0'), source_id (required, min_length=1), event_type (required), project (optional), correlation_id (optional), payload (required dict)
completion_promises.evidence: MessageEnvelope class in envelope.py with all 8 fields, correct types, defaults and constraints. Tests cover: auto-generated UUID, unique IDs, UTC timestamp, version default, optional fields, required field validation, min_length on source_id.

completion_promises.criterion_text: model_config = ConfigDict(extra='ignore') set for forward compatibility (ADR-002)
completion_promises.evidence: ConfigDict(extra='ignore') set on MessageEnvelope. Test test_extra_fields_ignored verifies unknown fields are silently discarded.
All 8 fields use Field(description=...). Test test_all_fields_have_descriptions programmatically verifies every field has a non-empty description.

completion_promises.criterion_text: JSON serialisation uses ISO 8601 for timestamps
completion_promises.evidence: Pydantic v2 serializes datetime as ISO 8601 by default. Test test_json_serialisation_iso8601_timestamp verifies the timestamp in JSON output parses as ISO 8601. Test test_json_roundtrip verifies full serialization/deserialization cycle.

EventType, MessageEnvelope, and payload_class_for_event_type imported and listed in __all__ in __init__.py. Three tests verify importability from nats_core root.
